# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <table>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td>
              "a"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: in-table-cell-start-tag-implies-row-group
  tree-builder: in-table-body-cell-start-tag-implies-tr
